name: 7-Eleven Fuel App
one_liner: Lock in cheap fuel prices from anywhere in AU and redeem at any 7-Eleven servo.
benefit: Lock in the cheapest 7-Eleven fuel price anywhere in Australia for up to 7 days; pay that locked price at your local servo regardless of current local price — significant savings during price-cycle peaks.

how_to_join.action: Download the 7-Eleven App (iOS or Android) and create a free account
Search for the cheapest fuel price nationally in the app and tap 'Lock in price'
how_to_join.detail: The app shows live fuel prices at every 7-Eleven in Australia.

how_to_join.action: Drive to any 7-Eleven servo and redeem the locked price within 7 days

prerequisites: A 7-Eleven servo within reasonable driving distance
risks: Price locks expire after 7 days — only lock when you plan to refuel soon
7-Eleven coverage is strongest in metro areas; check availability in your suburb
App requires location permission to find nearby servos
est_value: ~$10–30 saved per tank during price-cycle peaks compared with local servo prices
